description_long: This is a single, moccasin-style shoe featuring a soft, brown upper section made of what appears to be suede or leather, with a prominent decorative beaded pattern covering the sides and top. The beadwork is intricate, displaying a mix of blue, white, green, yellow, and red colors in geometric and possibly floral motifs. The shoe has a rounded toe and a low ankle cut, with a lace or tie at the front for securing the fit. The sole appears to be flexible and is also covered with beadwork, suggesting it is more decorative than utilitarian. The interior is lined with a lighter, possibly softer material, and the overall construction suggests it is handmade, likely for ceremonial or traditional use rather than everyday wear.
description: A moccasin-style shoe with brown suede upper and intricate multicolored beadwork covering the sides and top, featuring a lace tie and rounded toe.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shoe, the brown upper, and the detailed blue and white beadwork with geometric patterns.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, central lace tie, and symmetrical beadwork design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the brown upper and continuous beadwork, mirroring the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel area, the wrap of beadwork around the back, and the opening of the shoe.
